nasb.text: “Remember the word which Moses the servant of the Lord commanded you, saying, ‘The Lord your God gives you rest and will give you this land.’

esv.text: “Remember the word that Moses the servant of the Lord commanded you, saying, ‘The Lord your God is providing you a place of rest and will give you this land.’

cnv.text: “你們要記住耶和華的僕人摩西吩咐你們的話：‘耶和華你們的　神賜你們安息，他必把這地賜給你們。’

ccb.text: “你们要牢记耶和华的仆人摩西吩咐你们的话，他说你们的上帝耶和华要把约旦河东面的土地赐给你们，让你们安居。
